case_title: JOHN TRAN et al VS. STEPHANIE ASHLEY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY TRAN, JOHN TRAN, QUI AS TO DEFENDANT CHANSIN, STEPHANIE ASHLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, JOHN TRAN, QUI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANSIN, STEPHANIE ASHLEY $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,100.00, DEFENDANT ASKS TO CORRECT HER NAME ON THE COMPLAINT TO HER TRUE NAME, STEPHANIE ASHLEY CHANSIN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-28-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN RAMIL, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER---VICTOR NGO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$25.00) SERVED OCT-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHANSIN, STEPHANIE ASHLEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2)WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS WERE REPRESENTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER--VICTOR NGO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA. NOT REPORTED. (DEPT.506).
